data.title: CrowdStrike And Fortinet Partner To Supercharge Cybersecurity: Details
data.description: The CrowdStrike and Fortinet partnership enhances network and endpoint security while simplifying operations and improving threat detection and response.

data.title: Boeing Stock Braces For Bumpy Q3 Landing
data.description: Boeing stock to report Q3 earnings with $1.49 loss per share and $18.6B revenue. Investors hope for recovery from production issues and delivery delays.
